title: Cloportes
writer: Alphonse Boudard, Albert Simonin, Michel Audiard
actors: Lino Ventura, Charles Aznavour, Irina Demick
plot: Three petty criminals get a tip for a great coup with lots of money in it. Unfortunately they lack the starting funds to buy the required welding torch. So they persuade their successful colleague Alphonse to join their team. But ...
